mapper.select: select count(*) from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_cno = con_no) where sysdate between auc_start_date and auc_finish_date

select auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price ,to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_cno = con_no) where sysdate between auc_start_date and auc_finish_date order by auc_no desc

select auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price, to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_cno = con_no) where auc_no = #{aucNo}
select * from attachment where att_bno = (select auc_cno from auction where auc_no = #{aucNo}) and att_status = 'Y' and att_category = 2 and (att_fno = 2 or att_fno = 3) order by att_fno

select count(*) from bidding_interest where mem_id = #{id} and auc_no in
#{aucNo}

select a.auc_No, att_Rename, con_Author, con_Product, to_char(auc_start_Date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_Date, to_char(auc_Finish_Date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_Finish_Date, auc_Finish_Price from bidding_interest b join auction a on (a.auc_no = b.auc_no) join consignment on (a.auc_cno = con_no) join attachment p on (auc_cno = att_bno) where b.mem_id = #{id} and att_fno = 0

select a.auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price, to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction a join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_cno = con_no) join bidding_detail b on (a.auc_no = b.auc_no) where a.auc_no in (select b.auc_no from bidding_detail where b.mem_id = #{id} ) order by bid_no desc
select * from bidding_detail where mem_id = #{id} order by bid_no desc

select auc_no, auc_start_price, auc_finish_price, to_char(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_start_date, to_char(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as auc_finish_date, auc_mem_id, con_author, con_product, con_width, con_height, con_year, con_etc, att_rename from auction join (select * from consignment join attachment on (con_no = att_bno) where att_category = 2 and att_fno = 1) on (auc_no = con_no)
where sysdate >= to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and sysdate <= to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
where sysdate < to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
where sysdate > to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and con_product like '%' || #{content} || '%' or con_author like '%' || #{content} || '%'
and con_product like '%' || #{content} || '%'
and con_author like '%' || #{content} || '%'
and to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_date(#{aucSS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_date(#{aucSE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_date(#{aucFS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_date(#{aucFE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and con_product like '%' || #{content} || '%' and con_author like '%' || #{content} || '%'
and con_product like '%' || #{content} || '%'
and con_author like '%' || #{content} || '%'
and to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_date(#{aucSS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_date(auc_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_date(#{aucSE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= to_date(#{aucFS}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and to_date(auc_finish_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= to_date(#{aucFE}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
mapper.insert: insert into auction values(auc_seq.nextval, #{aucStartPrice}, default, to_date(#{aucStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), to_date(#{aucFinishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{aucNo}, null)
mapper.select: select * from attachment where att_bno = #{conNo} and (att_fno = 1 or att_fno = 2 or att_fno = 3)
